tasks.subject: [upload-files] [P3] Add paperclip button to ChatInput with hidden file input
tasks.description:
Add a paperclip button to `ChatInput` that triggers a hidden file input for file selection.

## 1. Update ChatInput Props

In `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/ChatInput.tsx`, add the `onAttach` prop to the interface:

```typescript
interface ChatInputProps {
  // ... existing props ...
  onCursorChange?: (pos: number) => void;
  /** Callback when files are selected via the paperclip button. */
  onAttach?: (files: File[]) => void;
}
```

Add `onAttach` to the destructured props:

```typescript
export const ChatInput = forwardRef<ChatInputHandle, ChatInputProps>(function ChatInput(
  {
    // ... existing props ...
    onCursorChange,
    onAttach,
  },
  ref
) {
```

## 2. Add File Input Ref

Add a ref for the hidden file input inside the component:

```typescript
const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
```

## 3. Add Import

Add `Paperclip` to the lucide-react import:

```typescript
import { ArrowUp, CornerDownLeft, Square, X, Paperclip } from 'lucide-react';
```

## 4. Add Paperclip Button and Hidden Input

Inside the `<div className="... flex items-end gap-1.5 ...">` container, add the paperclip button and hidden file input BEFORE the textarea:

```tsx
{onAttach && (
  <>
    <input
      ref={fileInputRef}
      type="file"
      className="hidden"
      multiple
      onChange={(e) => {
        const files = Array.from(e.target.files ?? []);
        if (files.length > 0) onAttach(files);
        e.target.value = ''; // Reset so same file can be re-selected
      }}
    />
    <button
      type="button"
      onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
      disabled={isDisabled}
      className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-md p-1.5 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50"
      aria-label="Attach file"
    >
      <Paperclip className="size-4" />
    </button>
  </>
)}
```

The button sits left of the textarea. The hidden file input is invisible but triggered by the button click. The `e.target.value = ''` reset after selection ensures the same file can be re-selected if removed and re-added.

## 5. Position

The paperclip button should appear before the textarea in the flex container. The existing layout is:
```
[textarea] [clear button] [send button]
```

After this change:
```
[paperclip] [textarea] [clear button] [send button]
```

The `shrink-0` class prevents the button from shrinking in the flex container.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Paperclip button appears left of the textarea when `onAttach` prop is provided
- Paperclip button is NOT rendered when `onAttach` is undefined/not provided
- Clicking the paperclip button opens the native file picker with multi-select enabled
- Selected files are passed to `onAttach` callback as `File[]`
- File input resets after selection so the same file can be re-selected
- Paperclip button is disabled when `isDisabled` (loading or session busy)
- Paperclip button has `aria-label="Attach file"` for accessibility
- `pnpm typecheck` passes for `apps/client`
- Existing ChatInput tests continue to pass (the button only renders when `onAttach` is provided)
